lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Viper Mk IV ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Viper Mk IV
sources.what: Ship specification, base stats, and shipyard pricing for this hull.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Viper Mk IV
sources.what: Hull role, manufacturer background, and hardpoint / internal layout.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Viper Mk IV, covering its handling, durability and small-pad combat role as a bounty hunter.
